title: Frontier Code (GPT-5.6 VS Mythos): This BENCHMARK is ACTUALLY REAL!
summary: Cognition released FrontierCode, a benchmark that measures whether AI-generated code is mergeable and production-ready, using blocker criteria and maintainer-defined rubrics rather than just test passing. The benchmark covers 36 open-source repositories and evaluates models like Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 across Diamond, Main, and Extended subsets.
